zh.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克
zh.Sawston, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾薩福斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Fenwyke於大約1430年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，她的父親Sir Henry Fenwick30歲，母親Lady Joan Leigh29歲。她和Sir John Hudleston至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1513年4月15日在英國波藍德米洛姆享年84歲。

zh-hans.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克
zh-hans.Sawston, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾薩福斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Fenwyke于大约1430年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克时，她的父亲Sir Henry Fenwick30岁，母亲Lady Joan Leigh29岁。她和Sir John Hudleston至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1513年4月15日在英国波藍德米洛姆享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fenwyke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fendick
meanings: English: locative name from Middle English fen ‘fen, marsh’ + dik(e), dich(e) ‘ditch, dyke’. The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived by a drainage dyke in fenland, or toponymic, for someone from a place so named, such as Thorpe Fendykes (Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Fenwyke was born about 1430, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, her father, Sir Henry Fenwick, was 30 and her mother, Lady Joan Leigh, was 29. She had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Sir John Hudleston. She died on 15 April 1513, in Millom, Cumberland, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Fenwyke est née environ 1430, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Fenwick, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Leigh, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Sir John Hudleston. Elle est décédée le 15 avril 1513, à Millom, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Fenwyke um 1430 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Fenwick 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Leigh 29. Sie hatte mit Sir John Hudleston mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. April 1513 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Millom, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Fenwyke è nata il circa 1430 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Fenwick, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan Leigh, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Sir John Hudleston. Morì il 15 aprile 1513, nel Millom, Cumberland, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Fenwykeが約1430年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Fenwickは30歳，母Lady Joan Leighは29歳であった。彼女はSir John Hudlestonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1513年4月15日にイギリスクウンバーランドミロムで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Fenwyke(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Fenwick(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Leigh(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Hudleston(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1513년 4월 15일 영국 쿠벌랜드 미롬에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: Alnwick, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Fenwyke nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Fenwick, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Leigh, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir John Hudleston. Ela faleceu em 15 de abril de 1513, em Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Fenwyke родилась около 1430 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Fenwick было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Leigh, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Sir John Hudleston. Она умерла 15 апреля 1513 г. в местности миллом, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary Fenwyke nació aproximadamente 1430, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Fenwick, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Leigh, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir John Hudleston. Murió el 15 de abril de 1513, en Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
